title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
input_format: A series of function calls to `insert`, `search`, and `startsWith`.
output_format: Boolean values indicating if the word or prefix exists in the Trie.
example_output: [null, null, true, false, true, null, true]
constraints:
- `1 <= word.length, prefix.length <= 2000`
- `word` and `prefix` consist only of lowercase English letters.
- At most `3 * 10^4` calls in total will be made to `insert`, `search`, and `startsWith`.
function_signature: class Trie { constructor() {} insert(word: string): void {} search(word: string): boolean {} startsWith(prefix: string): boolean {} }
